title: Elevators v2
description: Because who said mineshafts were the only type of shaft in Minecraft?
body:
Many servers need a quick way of getting from floor to floor in tall buildings and structures. You could use a stairwell, but those are slow and lame! You could use a water lift, but that simply lacks elegance. You could use Command Block teleport pads, but giving your builders access to Command Blocks can be... problematic. So what's the solution? Why **elevators**, of course!

Yes, this is the same Elevators plugin you may be familiar with. I've been developpping this plugin solo since Minecraft 1.9, inspired by the long since abandoned Lift plugin and original Elevators Forge mod. I've moved it here from BukkitDev/PMC/etc since this seems to be the new popular place for mods and plugins.

For usage instructions, please see [the README on GitHub](https://github.com/Pecacheu/Elevators-v2), or you can find video tutorials such as the one below _(Disclaimer: not made by me.)_

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/9nzRgzJEpJ0?si=HMl7gLwUoG_T67yt" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
